truth_boundaries: GitHub Pages is the formal public static deployment, not an OpenAI Sites preview.
Browser-local features are usable on Pages; model execution requires an actually available API endpoint.
Metrics are point-in-time facts and must be refreshed before an application is submitted.
This file records verified evidence and is not an acceptance or program-eligibility claim.
